description: Curated, deterministic demo scenarios for the VibeComfy preview-query picker. Each record points to a saved agentic run under out/agentic/agentic-100-20260630-021138/ but is intentionally usable even when that directory is not present (routes read artifacts at runtime only).

scenarios.title: TTS emotion injection
scenarios.query: Make the TTS narrator sound excited and emotional instead of flat.
scenarios.description: Adds emotion and emphasis parameters to a text-to-speech workflow without changing the script text.

scenarios.title: Qwen face distortion / wrong output slot
scenarios.query: Fix the Qwen image-edit node so the face doesn't distort and it uses the correct output slot.
scenarios.description: Corrects a wiring/output-slot mistake in a Qwen image-editing graph that was causing facial distortion.

scenarios.title: VACE identity / padded reference
scenarios.query: Keep the character's face consistent in the VACE video generation; pad the reference image so it fits the model's expected aspect ratio.
scenarios.description: Preserves character identity in a VACE-driven video generation workflow by padding the reference image to the expected resolution.

scenarios.title: 3D TripoRefine stage add
scenarios.query: Add a refinement stage to the 3D Tripo workflow so the mesh comes out cleaner.
scenarios.description: Inserts a TripoRefine refinement stage into a 3D-generation workflow to improve output mesh quality.

scenarios.title: Audio/video fps desync
scenarios.query: Fix the audio/video fps mismatch so the generated clip stays in sync.
scenarios.description: Aligns frame-rate and audio-sample-rate settings in a video workflow to eliminate lipsync drift.

scenarios.title: SDXL plastic → fabric
scenarios.query: Change the SDXL material from shiny plastic to woven fabric.
scenarios.description: Updates prompts and conditioning in an SDXL image-generation workflow to render a woven fabric material instead of plastic.

scenarios.title: Wan2.2 latent scaling fix
scenarios.query: The high-noise LoRA variant produces outputs identical to the low-noise variant.
scenarios.description: Adds ModelSamplingSD3 scaling into both Wan2.2 UNet chains and separates the high-noise LoRA strength.

scenarios.title: LLM caption override
scenarios.query: The prompt it generates doesn't capture what's in the image.
scenarios.description: Finds and removes a hardcoded caption that was overriding Florence2 image understanding before the LLM prompt stage.

scenarios.title: AnimateDiff LineArt enable
scenarios.query: The animation barely follows my input images.
scenarios.description: Discovers the LineArt preprocessor was disabled, enables the ControlNet conditioning path, and improves resolution.

scenarios.title: 3D mesh noise cleanup
scenarios.query: The generated 3D mesh is full of floating bits and noise.
scenarios.description: Uses research-backed 3D parameter changes to reduce floating mesh artifacts while preserving detail.

scenarios.title: Grid cells to 512px
scenarios.query: The preview grid looks too small and blurry — make each cell 512×512.
scenarios.description: Applies a multi-target batch edit that resizes all four preview-grid image resize nodes in one turn.

scenarios.title: Seed grid → horizontal row
scenarios.query: Arrange the four variations in a single horizontal row instead of a 2x2 grid.
scenarios.description: Replaces a 2x2 grid-composite node with ImageConcatMulti and rewires the split images into a row layout.

scenarios.title: Hunyuan i2v latent source
scenarios.query: The video doesn't resemble my input image at all — the first frame is completely different.
scenarios.description: Diagnoses a sampler initialized from the wrong reference-frame latent and disconnects that edge so image conditioning can drive the result.
